_comment: An SCA submission (src/ + xpi/) whose shipped XPI is readable, non-minified authored code. hasUnreviewableCode is false, so the pipeline downgrades to a plain XPI review and sets scaNotRequired (resolveReviewMode in src/pipeline.js); sca-not-required reports it (warning) so the developer submits only the XPI next time. The src/ tree is never reviewed after the downgrade. Complements the unit-level coverage in sca-pipeline.test.js with end-to-end report rendering.
